subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Alí! Though sorrows encompass Me from every direction and the clamor of the croakers hath been raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی مع آنکه احزان از هر جهتی احاطه نموده و نعاق ناعقین مرتفع شده
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for protection, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
